title: Clients uploading files

posts.author: Marcelo_BCN (Marcelo Frajmowicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again! I have a board where each row is a different client. I would like to send each one of these clients a form/link to upload files to their own row in the files column by themselves.

Is that possible??

Thanks a lot!

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: You might use a board with one form and all the clients’ files and connect every new upload (new item) with the corresponding client in the clients’ original board, upon one unique value (email or other) in both boards.

posts.author: bradley-dot (Bradley)
posts.cookedHtml: How is it possible to link the boards via the email field ?
